title: rumohra berteroana
intro: Rumohra berteroana, also known as the Bertero's fern or the Mexican leathery fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rumohra berteroana include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, and it can also be dried and powdered for use in capsules or as a dietary supplement.
